name: the reveal is non-committing: an un-activated namespace is not in scope, not activated, and not reported unprobed
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); c=d["workload_classification"]; nonact=d["full_surface"].reject{|e|e["activated"]}.map{|e|e["namespace"]}; leaked=nonact.select{|n|c["namespaces"].include?(n)||c["activated_probe_namespaces"].include?(n)||c["unprobed_in_scope"].include?(n)}; exit(leaked.empty? ? 0:1)' && echo reveal-non-committing 1>&2
